_metadata.title: Block Persistent Browser Sessions on Unmanaged Devices
_metadata.description: Prevents persistent browser sessions on unmanaged devices to reduce the risk of credential theft via shared or public computers.

displayName: GOV03 | Non-persistent Browser on Unmanaged Devices
postDeployment: Test from an unmanaged device and verify session expires as configured
Review Conditional Access insights in Report-Only mode for 7 days
Ensure Intune-enrolled devices are not impacted by the device filter
